version_description: It's a song that could be funny to cover with the right arrangement. It is a pretty easy one. No version including the full chords synchronized with raps existed before on the site, so here you go.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: The Jungle Book - I Wanna Be Like You
Unsubstantiated Rumors Are Good Enough For Me
